description: Dana Sipos coaxes silkworms out of their cocoons and spins them into song. She inhabited the far north before going nomad and her captivatingly nuanced songs are filled with a wild wind and a haunting surrealism. She now resides among the old growth of Vancouver Island. A consummate performer, Sipos has brought her unique brand of cosmic folk to living rooms, concert halls and festival stages across North America, Europe, Australia and New Zealand.
title: Dana Sipos Concert
